sessions.title: INC27080102 — corrected diagnosis, handed activity-id hypothesis to Niv
sessions.summary: Reopened INC27080102. Bumped global MCP_TIMEOUT to 120s to reconnect hades MCP. Queried Hades directly: profile is at _version 3 with lastUpdatingCallId matching the May 30 test event — stream-combiner is processing this BU correctly. Yesterday's stream-combiner-stopped theory was wrong. Real issue: activity doc id=7006487039 stuck at _version 1 since May 28; mapping uses customerNo as activity.id, suspect create-only suppression. Drafted handoff to Niv's infra team to verify whether any cdpActivities doc has _version > 1.
